events.event_title: Jeffrey Epstein at Palm Beach County Sheriff's Office (2006-08-09)
events.description: Jeffrey Epstein (Jacket #0338617, Booking ID 20060723017) appeared in a photo lineup at the Palm Beach Sheriff's Office on August 9, 2006, as part of the criminal investigation. His booking record shows DOB 01/20/1953, age 53, 6 feet tall, 180 lbs.; Palm Beach Sheriff's Office conducted a photo lineup procedure at 2:26 PM on August 9, 2006, as part of the criminal investigation into Jeffrey Epstein, documented across 2 pages of lineup information.
events.nexus_reasoning: Epstein personally booked and identified in Palm Beach Sheriff photo lineup during criminal investigation.
